reviews.comment:
Excelente Estación de Servicio al estilo inconfundible de ACA. Baños muy limpios y un mercado lleno de opciones gastronómicas para poder disfrutar en cualquier momento del día.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service station with ACA's unmistakable style. Very clean restrooms and a market full of food options to enjoy at any time of day.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNha3NYeVJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy amables para atender, baños para discapacidad limpisimos, todos con buena onda.

(Translated by Google)
Very friendly and helpful staff, the accessible restrooms were spotless, and everyone was very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhdkxpOG9RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención.  Baños impecables.  El precio d algunas comidas a veces caro pero todo muy fresco y ahora con buen protocolo covid. Se consiguen quesos, salames o conservas que no hay en todos lados y son muy buenas.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Spotless restrooms. The price of some meals is occasionally high, but everything is very fresh and now they have good COVID protocols. You can find cheeses, salamis, and preserves that aren't available everywhere, and they're very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ4bDRuWkdBEAE

reviews.comment:
Atienden super bien!! Uno al viajar tanto a esta acostumbrado A que no en todos los lugares no lo van a tratar bien.
Pero la verdad que este lugar me senti super bien atendida.
Ni hablar de la comida que era riquisima y a buen precio, gracias por todo!!!!

P/d aclaro que los baños eran un lujo, uno pensaria que los baños de las estaciones de servicio son sucias pero esto era todo lo contrario, hasta perfumadito estaba. Lo ame

(Translated by Google)
The service was amazing!! When you travel so much, you get used to not being treated well everywhere.

But honestly, I felt incredibly well taken care of at this place. And the food was delicious and reasonably priced! Thank you for everything!!!!

P.S. I should mention that the restrooms were fantastic. You'd think gas station restrooms would be dirty, but this was the complete opposite; it even smelled nice. I loved it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLenR2TmRREAE
